name: Carbon

source: Common raw. Rocky/icy body surface prospecting; abundant at brain-tree sites.

source: Scan high-energy frame-shift wakes near busy stars/stations.

source: Scan high-energy hyperspace wakes at high-traffic systems.

source: Very rare. Scan hi-grade wakes; best at Deciat and other busy engineer systems.

source: Data-point scans at surface settlements; ship data-link scans.

source: Scan shielded ships in combat; plentiful at RES / Combat Zones.

source: Scan shielded ships in combat; High-grade Emissions.
